    [IsAbsent] bit NOT NULL,
    [IsOvertime] bit NOT NULL,
    [IsOnLeave] bit NOT NULL,
    [IsHoliday] bit NOT NULL,
    [IsWeekend] bit NOT NULL,
    [IsExcused] bit NOT NULL,
    [LateDeductionAmount] decimal(18,2) NULL,
    [EarlyLeaveDeductionAmount] decimal(18,2) NULL,
